name: Akshit Mehta
tagline: Backend developer and data science student.
subtitle: I turn experiments into tested, deployable backend, ML, and AI systems.
summary: Backend-focused software developer building API-heavy systems, ML pipelines, RAG tools, and automation workflows across Python, Java, FastAPI, Flask, Django REST Framework, Docker, and GitHub Actions.

workingOn.title: MAIT & IIT Madras
workingOn.description: B.Tech in IT (CGPA 9.30) and IIT Madras BS in Data Science and Applications, Diploma Level (CGPA 8.93). Expected 2027.

workingOn.title: Backend, ML & RAG Systems
workingOn.description: Building production-style projects with Flask, FastAPI, Celery, Redis, ChromaDB, PyTorch, Docker, GitHub Actions, and LLM integrations.

education.detail: BS in Data Science and Applications, Diploma Level, CGPA 8.93

work.title: Backend Developer
work.description: Assisted Laravel to Django migration work, built and updated REST API endpoints with Django REST Framework, and debugged backend issues across models, serializers, and API responses.

projects.title: Cortex
projects.description: RAG codebase companion that indexes repositories, pull requests, merge descriptions, and diff summaries with AST-aware chunking and streaming chat APIs.
projects.imageAlt: Cortex answering a repository question with cited code references

projects.title: LeafSR
projects.description: Plant leaf super-resolution pipeline using an ESRGAN-lite conditional GAN, RRDB blocks, AMP, EMA checkpointing, Docker packaging, and CI smoke tests.
projects.imageAlt: LeafSR comparison of low-resolution input, bicubic baseline, model output, and high-resolution target

projects.title: BehaveGuard
projects.description: Continuous biometric authentication system using keystroke rhythm and mouse kinematics with SVM, LSTM, and TCN score fusion.

projects.title: Comment Toxicity
projects.description: Four-class toxicity classifier with 66+ engineered features, OOF target encoding, blend optimization, and tuned per-class thresholds.
projects.imageAlt: Comment Toxicity model comparison chart showing LightGBM results

projects.title: Keyway
projects.description: Self-hosted secrets vault with PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA256, Redis-backed session-only key handling, PostgreSQL storage, and Docker deployment.

projects.title: TDS Quiz Solver
projects.description: LLM agent orchestration project with browser extraction, sandboxed code execution, API endpoints, and Dockerized deployment.

skills.languages: Python, Java, SQL, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML/CSS, Bash
skills.frameworks: FastAPI, Flask, Django REST Framework, Vue 3, PyTorch, scikit-learn, Celery, Redis, SQLAlchemy
skills.tools: Docker, Docker Compose, GitHub Actions, Linux, AWS EC2/S3, PostgreSQL, SQLite, MongoDB, ChromaDB
